hmong.where_the_function_crosses_the_x_axis_: Qhov chaw uas function hla x-axis. Ntawm cov points no, f(x) = 0. Kev nrhiav roots yog qhov tseem ceeb hauv algebra thiab calculus.

hmong.the_slope_tells_you_how_steep_the_func: Slope qhia koj tias function ntxaj npaum li cas ntawm ib qho point twg. Tangent line kov qhov curve ntawm ib qho point nkaus xwb. Siv trace slider los tshawb!
hmong.the_derivative_measures_the_rate_of_ch: Derivative ntsuas qhov rate of change. Qhib nws saib slope hloov li cas thoob plaws function. Qhov chaw uas f′(x) = 0, function muaj local maximum los yog minimum.
hmong.the_shaded_area_represents_the_integra: Cov shaded area sawv cev rau integral — tag nrho «accumulation» ntawm f(x). Hauv lub neej tiag, nov txhais tau tias kev deb mus, energy siv, los yog probability.
hmong.when_a_0_the_parabola_opens_up_when_a_: Thaum a > 0, parabola qhib mus saum toj (⏣). Thaum a < 0, qhib mus hauv qab (⏢). Vertex yog qhov turning point. Sim hloov 'a' saib!
hmong.amplitude_a_controls_the_height_freque: Amplitude (a) tswj qhov siab, frequency (b) tswj muaj pes tsawg cycles, thiab phase shift (c) txav wave mus sab laug/sab xis. Period = 2π/b.
